scripts.build: npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-page-templates && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react-structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react && npm run build -w @mdwrk/page-template-demo-content-pack && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test tests/consumer-cutover-t0.test.mjs tests/consumer-cutover-t1.test.mjs tests/consumer-cutover-t2.test.mjs tests/showcase-split-t0.test.mjs tests/showcase-split-t1.test.mjs tests/showcase-split-t2.test.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-page-templates && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react-structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-react && npm run build -w @mdwrk/page-template-demo-content-pack && tsc --noEmit
